entry.title: Re: S4HANA Situation type PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR not found
entry.content: @Mandy2025 Have you taken a look at the blog post Help – Why don't I get a situation notification? The focus is on the standard framework, but it also applies to the extended framework.

entry.title: Re: Different results between iRPA and Build Process Auto...
entry.content:
Obviously, I can only see 100 pages because of limits imposed by SBPA: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/quotas-restrictions-and-limits#process-workflow-capability

For the output mapping, the limit per task is 100, which compels me to customize my project based on these limits. This is a drawback compared to iRPA.

For those who would face the same issue: if you want this to have a chance to be improved for your further usage, please raise a request as suggested here 0000000011 so SAP dev team considers to implement this in the future.

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS "Transition to SAP S/4HANA Using Downtime-Optimized Conversion"(March 19, 2025)
entry.content:
Virtual

Agenda

March 19, 2025

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on Transition to SAP S/4HANA Using Downtime-Optimized Conversion taking place virtually on March 19th, 2025. Please find the current agenda here.

In this workshop you’ll understand various aspects of Downtime-Optimized Conversion to minimize the business downtime while transition to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition or On-Premise or Hyperscalers.

  • Tools and Approaches to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition or On-Premise, focusing on the Downtime-Optimized Conversion to minimize your business downtime during the transition
  • Data Transition Validation during the Transition to SAP S/4HANA to ensure data consistency as a foundation to better use the SAP S/4HANA
  • How SAP MaxAttention will be able to plan and safeguard your Downtime-Optimized Conversion to SAP S/4HANA Project

You will be able to grasp a good understanding of how to plan your Downtime-Optimized Conversion project to secure minimal business disruption. SAP MaxAttention will be able to support you in every step of your journey of transitioning to SAP S/4HANA to minimize the risk and maximize the result!

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Important

Please note that the 'Attend' button which can be found within this blog post does not serve as a formal registration for the event.

To officially register, please reach out to me, paul.schropp@sap.com and I will ensure that your registration is properly processed.

We look forward to having you join us for our upcoming events and thank you for your understanding!

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Re: Different results between iRPA and Build Process Auto...
entry.content: Hi @Thierry , I already logged the loop index and the results are still truncated. I have also launched the job in production mode and I only get part of the results... As explained by SAP support team after submitting a ticket, the issue is the limit imposed by SBPA, which is a real drawback compared to what iRPA can do. See my post for further explanation. Thanks for your response.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge: Demystifying the Remote Conversion
entry.content:
Hi KP,

1) Calc. views are not supported in BW bridge and need to be recreated in Datasphere.

2) Query objects are not functional in BW bridge, but you can use the Entity Import to move the elements to Datasphere to reuse the semantics and build your data model, which can be consumed by SAC. Please see:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/entity-import-model-transfer-for-single-query-sap-bw-bridge/ba-p/13557138 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/a3d4a2f91bea4810ba8839ff73577dac.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards, Felipe

entry.title: Re: see 0F document type data in reconciliation balance a...
entry.content:
Hi,

we encountered a similar issue after upgrading to S4H2023.

Since S4H 2022 ICMR (Intercompany Matching and Reconciliation) uses the FYV (Fiscal Year variant) assigned to the relevant consolidation version. In out case we discovered that that no FYV is assigned to version Y10. If no FYV is specified, ICMR cannot read data from ACDOCA, which leads to the missing data.

2935283 - Intercompany Reconciliation Report Can't Read Data from ACDOCA - SAP for Me

You assign the FYV in SPRO here:

I hope this helps : )

entry.title: Re: Plant Abroad Functionality for Non-EU and Non-GCC Countries in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for sharing the detailed solution. Our ABAP team is working to find enhancement point so that in case of Non-EU scenario system can read tax procedure based on reporting country and company code country. Could you please suggest enhancement point or if further technical information available.

entry.title: Re: Payment Method not viewable in APP Manage Supplier Line
entry.content: Hi Cristina, Thank you so much for your support, I´ll translate the information with our client. BR

entry.title: SAP Community Events in Warsaw - 2025
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm excited to organize multiple events this year to bring SAP professionals together, share knowledge, and network. Below is an overview of the planned activities.

The only thing that is set is the first SAP CodeJam. All other topics are open. That’s why I would really like to ask for your collaboration, suggestions, comments, or feedback on what we could do in Warsaw as part of the SAP Community.

1. SAP CodeJam: ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

📅 Date: April 1, 2025
📍 Location: Warsaw
🔹 Hands-on coding session focused on ABAP Cloud and RAP. A great opportunity to deepen technical expertise with SAP technologies.

2. SAP CodeJam – June Edition

📅 Date: June 2025 (Exact date TBD)
📍 Location: Warsaw
🔹 Another hands-on session with a yet-to-be-decided topic. Suggestions are welcome!

3. SAP Warsaw Mega Event: CodeJam + Stamtisch + SITWAW

📅 Date: September 19-20, 2025
📍 Location: Warsaw
🔹 A combination of:

  • SAP CodeJam
  • Stammtisch 
  • SAP Inside Track Warsaw (SITWAW) 
    This will be the biggest SAP gathering in Warsaw this year!

4. SAP CodeJam – November Edition

📅 Date: November 2025 (Exact date TBD)
📍 Location: Warsaw
🔹 Another hands-on coding event—topic to be announced later.

Bartek

entry.title: Re: Plant Abroad Functionality for Non-EU and Non-GCC Countries in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: @former_member746772   Need your input here.

entry.title: LearningHub - Practice System
Re: 1 warehouse order for outbound with two activity areas
entry.content:
Hi @castin ,

no, this is not possible. If you want to have one warehouse order (WO) to pick from both areas, you might consider to model them as one activity area.

In addition, you can try if you can manually assign a warehouse task (WT) from one WO to another WO using the methods in the monitor.

Best regards,

Christian

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite: Storing SAP CPI Message Processing Logs in SAP HANA Cloud for Long Term Reten
entry.content: @Daggolu_PremSai  Thanks for the information

entry.title: Send reminder notification to manager after 48 hours when candidate is in status: 'Manager Review'
entry.content:
In talent pipeline, for any requisition, Once candidate is moved to 'Manager Review' applicant status there is an email notification that is being sent.
Can we set a reminder email for the same to the hiring manager if no action is taken by hiring manager after 48 hours?

Our question is: Is it possible to set a reminder on any status in Talent pipeline, after few hours / days.. Thanks.

entry.content:
Hi,

This is detailed information about Contract and Lease Management in S4HC Public Cloud.

Contract typeContract groupObject typeCondition typeGL

entry.title: Unable to change Product Base Unit due to "Routings already exist that are assigned to the material"
entry.content:
We have created a Product the wrong Base unit of measurement as 'EA'. Now we have to change the Base unit of measurement as 'M'. When we try to change the unit of measurement in Change material ( MM02) Tile - System is showing error. We have checked the error in "Display Error". System is showing Quality plan group number. Actually Quality plan is deleted from our end through app Change Inspection Plan  (QP02 ) but still we're getting this error "Routings already exist that are assigned to the material".

Please guide us to change the UOM.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Rewards & Recognition: Guidelines formula
entry.content:
Hello @AndresCarter!

Many thanks for your help. In fact, I had the challenge to find the correct scenario, since the Basis currently is not available. In the end my rule is with the following setup:

However, I am currently struggling to hide the currency (when the guideline is chosen), as it now refers to a percentage rather than a monetary value.

 

Do you have any idea?

Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Unable to change Product Base Unit due to "Routings a...
entry.content:
The Inspection Plan is only logically deleted but still exists in the tables.

 

To remove the Inspection Plan(s) please archive them using the archiving object QM_PLAN  

afterwards the Base unit of measurement can be changed

entry.title: Supplier Hierarchy in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello fellow members,

Is Supplier Hierarchy available in S/4 HANA On=Prem or Cloud edition. I see the SPRO config under MM->Purchasing-->Supplier Master but do not find any Transaction code to create and maintain the Supplier Hierarchy nodes in front end.

When I check the SAP Help, it takes me to Supplier Hierarchy under Retail & Fashion.

Is there a Transaction code in MM similar to VDH1N for Customer Hierarchy?

Any help in this regards is highly appreciated!

Thanks,

Aakash

entry.title: Sales Order Created via Client Certificate Authentication Classified as Digital Access
entry.content:
Customer is using SAP Business Process Automation (BPA) to create a Sales Order in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) by calling OData API.

The API call is made using a client certificate authentication destination in SAP BTP, where the keystore is created from the service key of the SAP Build Process Automation subscription.

Given this setup, the created Sales Order is classified as a Digital Access document.

 

  • Is it expected that Sales Orders created via client certificate authentication are counted under Digital Access?
  • Would using a Named User with Basic Authentication or Oauth2 User token exchange authentication instead of a service key avoid the Digital Access classification?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: COP1 Transaction - error message VHUPD002 For the mat...
entry.content:
Hi ChrisAlex,

there is no specific customizing setting for transaction COP1 or COP2 in S/4HANA.

Either you condition record or determination customizing does not match here.

Go to SPRO/SIMG > Logistics - General > Handling Unit Management > Automatic Packing > Determination of Packing Instructions > Define Procedure for Packing Instructions Determination. Here you can see that the procedure '000002' is used for packing in production and has the condition types SHIP and STOC.

At the same customizing level you find “Define Access Sequence for Packing Instructions Determination”. Here you can see for the condition types SHIP and STOC the corresponding condition tables and key fields.

Best regards,
Barış

entry.title: Re: Moving Average Price changing after procurement of fr...
entry.content:
Hello @Aicha_000 

I've not said that you need to activate split valuation on batch level. I'd say you don't need that.

First of all, you should challenge the requirement not to modify moving average prices when receiving free samples. That's simply not logical.

Then you can use split valuation with a valuation types "regular goods" and "free samples".

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: VL01N FIELD validation with Z_USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCEMENT...
entry.content:
Hi, 

i recommend to delete modification in USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT in MV50AFZ1 and implement BADI LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC. In method SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE add Your check, and change type message to type E - Error not I - Information. This should solved Your problem.

entry.title: “Communication scenario Communication scenario SAP_COM_0070 is not in is not in scope"
entry.content:
I am trying to connect SAP and Concur.. i get the following error  “Communication scenario Communication scenario SAP_COM_0070 is not in is not in scope" 

Any documentation how to resolve this error ? 

Thanks..

entry.title: Re: vf01 negative balance error and user exit with export...
entry.content:
Hi, 

If You have implemented enhancement only with passing value from import to export will not cause any error. 

But for smooth process I recommend to deactivate extension (CTRL+SHIFT+F4) in TCODE CMOD.

entry.title: Re: Different results between iRPA and Build Process Auto...
entry.content:
@Thierry here is the ticket number: 259373/2025 Hope this can be fixed quickly. We migrate to SBPA to enjoy improved features and supposedly more convenient working practices... And this limitation is not handy at all.

Let us know when this can be solved.

Thanks.

LM.

entry.title: Re: Blog series on my CPI + Camel learning journey
entry.content: @alex_myakinkiivery interesting. You are paving the way to local testing. I'm looking forward to see your next blog articles/videos.

entry.title: Re: [Q] MaxDB System Copy - VERY FRUSTRATED !!!
entry.content:
Hello,

I can understand your frustration. System copy is more advanced operation which requires some experience. If you are doing system copy of a SAP system you can consider using R3load based export/import.

Current system copy implementation using database backup is implemented for a simple case with just one backup file. Therefore you should recover manually (SWPM provides this option too).

The misery with DB studio is probably because you believe that you are using case sensitive passwords. What is not true. (internally SWPM turns the passwords uppercase). Therefore on login in DB studio clear the check box for case sensitivity.

I hope you are doing system copy in context of migration to S4HANA or another product. The official life time of MaxDB is running out in 2027 with regular support and 2030 with extended support. Please check the SAP note 1178367 - SAP MaxDB: End of Support Dates - SAP for Me

For further processing of your issue it is reasonable if you open SAP case, as hier not just one issue, but many putting toghether. How you expect an effective help on this?

To be able to recover a parallel backup of #15 devices you need to set the database parameter MaxBackupMedia to 15 or higher. Afterwards put db to offline and to admin state again.

Good luck!

entry.title: BW-MT Transformation lookup rule with compounded objects
entry.content:
when editing a transformation which contain a lookup rule for compounded objects, the compounding field disappears after saving TRFN in eclipse and can only be added by re-creating the lookup rule.

 

Has anybody an better solution?

entry.title: What's New for Regulatory Changes - Spanish User Group for Human Capital Management
entry.content:
We invite you to join an online session on current and upcoming regulatory changes in Spain. This session aims to enhance communication and collaboration, facilitating a better understanding of customer needs and expectations. Don't miss the opportunity to ask questions to the expert on localization at SAP!

Speaker: Gema Moraleda, Localization Product Manager, SAP Globalization, SAP.

This event will be hosted by Spanish User Group (AUSAPE). It is intended for AUSAPE members and will be conducted in Spanish.
Questions should be sent in advance to the coordinators.

Check out the agenda.

REGISTRATION LINK

If you want to get more information about localization in Spain and collaborate with SAP users, join the Spain - Human Capital Management Localization Work Zone group.

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a 4-system landscape DS4-->QS4-->RS4-->PS4 where RS4 is the pre-production system (it belong to a transport group dedicated so TR are deployed in sequence QS4->RS4->PS4).

I would like to use transport checks also in RS4 (before deploying features in PS4), but it seems that transport checks works only between productive tenant PS4 and source tenant DS4.

Do you know if it is possible to extend transport checks functionality also to pre-prod environment?

Regards
Maurizio

Regards,

Isaías

If any one will explain the same , I will be great full. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Unable to add fields in CT04
entry.content:
Custom table need to be activated to add table and field to CT04. 

If this is not Your case -> send me more details for table (Definition, status etc) and characteristic which You want to create.

entry.title: Re: Execution Status in Service with Advanced Execution
entry.content:
Hi Shraddha, 

I was trying to create Service Order Quotation with Advance Execution but at Item level the status is showing as Open and no other status is coming in drop down like In process, Released, Completed...Is it missing customizing setting? If yes can you guide me with that.

Thanks,

Deepak Singh

entry.title: CPI Manage Security Material OAuth2 Client Credentials via CloudConnector
entry.content:
Hello,

we have a very simple iFlow which is supposed to send a json-body to a http endpoint which is located in our network and the host and endpoint path are accessible via cloudconnector.

Now when trying to reach the virtual host in the http adapter it works as long as we are using basic auth. When using the oauth2 credential(which is maintained in Security Material) we get an error which says that the host is not reachable.

When maintaining the Oauth Credentials we use the same host as in the endpoint to the http adapter, however we have no options to enter proxy & location id. 

Anyone got an idea or got a working setup with a similiar scenario?

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Madrid 2025 - Mar 21, 2025
entry.content: Thanks for organizing this event. I was wondering if we will receive a confirmation after registration?

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP C...
entry.content:
Certification for ABAP Cloud is here https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-back-end-developer-abap-cloud#how-to...

You can learn from : 

  • https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills
  • https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/practicing-clean-core-extensibility-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud

Additionally You can learn from books which You can buy from SAP PRESS

  • https://www.sap-press.com/

Example test You can perform on this platform: 

  • https://www.erpprep.com/sap-cloud-solutions/c-abapd-2309-sap-abap-cloud-back-end-developer
  • https://www.udemy.com/courses/search/?src=ukw&q=C_ABAPD

If You need more information please reply what You need more.

entry.title: SAC - Variance between different version and different time period
entry.content:
Hi team , 

 I need to find the variance between 2 versions with different time period - for eg variance between Forecast of current year and budget planned for next year . I did try with restricted measures and calculated measures but since the time period is different i am unable to achieve it. 

Assume when done with client calculations , it will have an impact when filters are changed . 

Can any one help with this scenario on how to do this

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer inside UpdatePanel displays onl...
entry.content:
Hi,

If I set detailed width/height for report viewer, then report is displayed successfully. However, we face few UI issues like report viewer is not auto adjusting based on monitor size/scaling. Because of this we have to set Height and Width fixed to 100%, so that, Report Viewer automatically adjusts based on screen size.

If we set BestFitPage to true, then as I already mentioned, report alignment gets changed and it does not match with our UI requirement. Please refer the below screenshots.

BestFitPage="True" Width="100%" Height="100%"

 

BestFitPage="False" Width="100%" Height="100%" - Report Viewer is fit to entire client area and Page is center aligned and that matches our requirement as well. However, this works only outside Asp UpdatePanel.

Thanks,

Aravind

entry.title: Re: New Employee Business Partner Data Model in SAP S/4HANA 2020 On-Premise
entry.content:
Hi there,

In a hub-system architecture, where a central system distributes data to connected systems - replicating employee BP data is not possible. It requires specific configurations but which SAP does not recommend. So the standard setup may not support direct replication of employee BP data from the hub to other systems.

My question is: what is SAP's suggestion to apply the (new) employee BP model concpt for a hub-system architecture? Is it HCM -> Hub-system and HCM -> Target System?

As an example, here is a high-level approach:

The employee-BP should be visible in the hub-system as well as in the target system.

Thanks & regards,

Erdal

P.S. - I am not referring to MDG.

entry.title: Re: TEST How-To Refresher for EMEA Team
entry.content: This is a test comment

entry.title: Re: ABAP Message Channel Bindings
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: 🇳🇱 SAP CodeJam: Service Integration with CAP ('s-Hertogenbosch, NL)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam introduces attendees to service integration with the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP). Specifically, the Node.js flavor of CAP is used.

During this event, you'll become acquainted with how external services can be integrated and consumed from within a CAP project. In working through the exercises you'll also become comfortable with various facilities that CDS offers for declaring, relating and exposing entities, and familiar with how the SAP Cloud SDK covers connectivity and destinations, supporting such integration scenarios with CAP.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Fri 23 May 2025 in 's-Hertogenbosch, NL. It is being kindly hosted by the lovely folks at newFounders - the CodeJam will take place in their offices. Thanks! 

The instructor is Developer Advocate DJ Adams. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-service-integration-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page. Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees for this event. In that context, if you indicate that you're attending and later realise you can't, please remove your name so that others get a chance instead. Thanks!

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: CPI Manage Security Material OAuth2 Client Credential...
entry.content:
Hello,

so on premise call to a token provider is not directly possible via Security Material.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3474373/E

entry.title: Re: LMS Search for Library-No libraries were found with t...
entry.content: Is there another Learning admin that has the same role and is this Learning admin also impacted? Try changing the role to "ALL" to verify the system behavior.

entry.title: Do you know how to manage your transportation processes effectively?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Transportation Management learning journey.

Overview
This course will help you to prepare for the blueprinting stage of your SAP Transportation Management implementation or enable you to use the system in your role as a business user.

Learning objectives 
You will gain an overview of the key business transactions and system capabilities to enable you to design the processes you will use within your own organization. You will learn how SAP TM can help you to support Order Management, Transportation Planning, Subcontracting, Execution, Charge Calculation and Settlement.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting- Anonymize Candidate Profile and Applications

What is the best practice for anonymizing hired candidates? This is important to our customer, any advice is highly appreciated.

KR

entry.title: How to Create a Section for Work Center Views in the UI Designer
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Does anyone know how to create a section group for work center views in UI Designer? The sample image below is divided into 3 sections. I want to do the same with my custom business objects. I also want to know how to include "Common Task" on the work center.

entry.title: Criticality in Projection View of RAP BO with draft, best practice?
entry.content:
Hi RAP developers,

in our draft enabled RAP BO (for business configuration) we have a Lifecyle State field (DRAFT, RELEASED, DEPRECATED). We want to show Criticality Colors (ie @ui.identification.criticality, @ui.lineitem.criticality), Criticality needs to be 1,3,2 respectivly.

So where to calculate this, ie do

case LifecycleState when 'DEPRECATED' then 2 when 'DRAFT' then 1 else 3 end as LifecycleCriticality

?

In the Projection View I get "Field LIFECYCLECRITICALITY contains a not supported expression".

When I do this in the R View, IMHO I have to do this also in the Query View for the draft, or? This would not so nice, having to write this twice...

Why can't I add such simple calculations which are UI related in the C View (and not have this field in an API I-View)?

Any other suggestions? What is best practice here?

I am aware of https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.ui.comp.smartfield.SmartField%23annotations/IsConfigurationDeprecationCode but IMHO this is not supported in RAP...

Regards,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: DWS class grouping
entry.content: You use it to create evaluation criteria for a daily work schedule. According to the evaluation criteria, daily work schedules can be used in differen ways in time wage type selection, attendance and absence counts, or in time evaluation. The working times defined in a daily work schedule are not influenced by the assignment of a daily work schedule class. As a result, the daily work schedule class respresents an additional evaluation of a daily work schedule. Daily work schedule classes can be identified by any number between 0 and 9. Example: You want to specify a working time model in which Saturday is a day off but your employees can work if they choose to do so. You define a daily work schedule with the desired planned hours and classify it with the daily work schedule class 0, which is stored as a day off.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Services Designer crash after adding functio...
entry.content: I've solved it, the problem was the selection of output parameter (I had to select AL_RFC_RETCODE). Thank you.

entry.title: Can someone help me on how to activate batch strategy on storage location
entry.content: SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: cwip asset number and fixed asset number, difference? pathway to WBS elements via tables and fields
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am making a Z report. It should display several object fields, including CWIP asset number and Fixed asset number for the corresponding WBS element. For this, as I found, this should be linked to wbs element via tables and common fields.

so, how to differentiate in the report or create a logical pathway for the two when both CWIP asset number and Fixed asset number has same tables and fields i.e. ANLA and ANLN1?

entry.title: After running the script recorded in SAP, the system closes and errors apear
Re: Important Update: Changes to the Free Tier Option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi All,

During my ABAP Cloud development in the Free Tier (not the Trial Account) version, I noticed that some standard function modules and classes that I frequently use in my S/4HANA system are not accessible.

Are these standard objects restricted in the Free Tier version?
Will I gain access to them if I switch to the Pay-As-You-Go plan?

If anyone has any knowledge about this, kindly share your insights.

Thanks!

@FrankJentsch @Burcu_Karlidag

entry.title: Re: Can assign users to specific user group in target sys...
entry.content:
No, as per SAP Note 2984603, SAP Identity Provisioning Service (IPS) does not natively support assigning users to specific user groups in SAP AS ABAP on-premise. The note specifically lists supported target systems, including SAP Ariba, SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Commerce Cloud, SAP SuccessFactors, and others that use SCIM or other APIs for user provisioning.

For SAP AS ABAP on-premise, you would typically need to use an indirect approach, such as:

  1. Using SAP Identity Management (IdM): If integrated with IPS, IdM can assign roles and groups in ABAP systems.
  2. Custom Provisioning via BAdIs: Implementing BAdIs (e.g., BADI_IDENTITY_PROVISIONING) in the ABAP system to process user assignments.
  3. ABAP Custom Reports or Scripts: Extracting user assignments from IPS and applying them using ABAP reports (e.g., SU01, PFCG role assignments).
  4. LDAP Integration: If your ABAP system supports LDAP authentication, IPS could provision users to an LDAP directory that the ABAP system queries.

entry.title: Re: vf01 negative balance error and user exit with export parameter = import parameters
entry.content: Basically, since you didn't deactivate the CMOD projects, the exit FMs are executed and if SAP didn't prefill the returned/changed parameters, they are sent back cleared, initial.

entry.title: Re: Is there a hard limit on the number bookmarks in SAP...
entry.content:
@PatriciaR55 

I am not aware of a hard limit in terms of count but there is a limit on size of bookmarks. As per the note below its 90 MB.

3574030 - What is the size limit of saved bookmarks for stories in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) ? - SAP for Me

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: How to include Project System in Make-to-Stock proces...
entry.content:
Project system is a module and Make-To-Stock is a Business process. Probably, you need to give a brief explanation on

  • what the Business process is,
  • what efforts you made so far to configure and integrate with PS
  • if system gives any error during your configuration, share the screen shot

entry.title: Re: On Integration Suite page, left menu items are not vi...

entry.title: How to regenerate the system certificates in sap po 7.5?
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Good day!

We have a SAP standard system certificate expiring on March 17th, in SAP PO Quality and Production.

Please can you provide new certificate to renew it timely for avoiding any disconnections. Kindly provide us the procedure to update the certificates. in SAP PO landscape.

Thanks & Regards
Gopi


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to regenerate the system certificates in sap po 7.5?
entry.content:
Dear Gopi, Greetings

In order to update/regenerate the system certificates for your PO systems please refer to the bellow SAP KBA and follow the steps provided in the resolution section starting from the element 2/:

1770585 - How to configure SSL on the AS Java

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: How to generate your SAP Datasphere documentation aut...
entry.content:
There is no need to code, just a few formulas in the views in SAP Datasphere.
The model thus created allows you to directly do the documentation in realtime as in the example.


The objective of the post is to show through the lineage the sources that allow you to do what is necessary.

My current problem is to find the metadata data such as the Business Purpose, the AM formulas as well as the labels because only the technical names are available

entry.title: Difference between document currency amount and hard currency amount in FBL3N
entry.content:
Hello all,

User have posted some documents in which the document currency and Hard currency ( Local currency 2 ) is the same but in FBL3N report it  is showing two different amounts for the same currency.

For example

Below amounts we can see in the FBL3N report
Document currency is MZN - 1,669,042.28

Hard currency ( Local currency 2 ) is also MZN  - 1,673,836.60

Can anyone help on how can there be a difference between document currency and local currency 2 when its the same currency having same exchange rate ?

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Where is the unlimited overdelivery allowed indicator...
entry.content: In material master under Work Scheduling tab, you can see both Under delivery tolerance and Over delivery tolerance.  Once it is maintained, it will be taken care in PR & POs

entry.content:
While submitting electronic invoicing for Brazil, I am getting the below errors. although I maintained all the required fields still I am getting the same error message and not allowing to submit the billing document.

I checked master data and In change nota fiscal I maintained "Financial Data" and "NF-e" tabs but still i am getting the below errors. Can you please suggest what else i can check.

entry.title: Re: How To Create A Basic Custom Entity?
entry.content:
I don't agree

Why Use Custom Entities?

  • No Database Needed: You don't need to create database tables. not "No database needed", if you have data in db that you can use, why bother to use custom entity?
  • Flexible Data Sources: Fetch data from APIs, services, or other systems.
  • Great for Reporting: Use it to display data without saving anything. great for reporting are you kidding?
  • Works with CDS Views: You can combine it with other SAP data models.

custom entity just gives you an option to model your data model where your data cannot be fetched from db directly. nothing great.

entry.content: @Matthew_Shaw Thank you for sharing that. Are there any plans to support also the "Application User" Context variable to establish row-level security per individual users over a technical connection?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting - New Balance Validation Process
entry.content:
@harivenkatesh_subramanian 

First, I would like to convey my regards and appreciation for sharing this valuable information. It has been truly helpful.

I have a few clarifications that I raised with SAP Support regarding the new features and the Balance Validation Task process. To gain clarity, they asked me to refer to your blog by sharing the link, which I found informative and appreciated your effort. However, after reviewing your videos, I still find some aspects unclear. If you don't mind, could you please look into these and provide clarification? Your insights would be greatly appreciated.

Question:

1) In your video, you directly navigate to the 'Manage Your Solution' app and land on the page where you can filter the "Application Area" and "Sub Application Area" for data processes, and find the "Configure" option under 'Define Balance Validation Task'. However, in my case, we don't reach this page directly. Instead, we see the message "The business configuration of this tenant is managed by SAP Central Business Configuration," which provides two links: one redirects to the SAP Help page, and the other to the SAP Central Business Configuration page. After selecting the relevant option, we still cannot find the filter option to configure the 'Define Balance Validation Task'. Instead, we see the "Configuration" option, which shows the same options as the Implementation page (Display IMG: Authorized Activities page). We are unable to locate the "Define Balance Validation Task". I have explained this issue in a ticket to the SAP Support Team as well.

2) According to KBA 3553668 and the SAP Help page, it is mentioned that "we need to toggle the feature for Balance Validation (FINCS_BV_ADAPTATION) in the configuration activity 'Activate Features.' However, we cannot find this in the system.

Page:https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/e01c5fc486f145be8f90f44c5f6b38d9.html

and in the SAP page they mentioned to "Activate Feature" which I was unable to find you followed this in the video ( I may consider this may automatically activated or backend enable to demonstrated this Video which I apricated) but I couldn't able to get the clarity on this and I was unable find in your video as well, Am I missing something to understand here?

3) I tried to drill down to get more information when i couldn't able find these option to enable it and If found the below page where SAP mentioned detailed about 'Activate Feature" 

SAP Page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b249d650b15e4b3d9fc2077ee921abd0/3e94fcc37b42433b97d6aef0c830dc52.html

Regarding the mentioned in the "NOTE" - Do you have any inputs here, Im keen to understand how this process happen in your above "Demo" case and How it differs for customers. If you agree with the "Note", Do you have any time line when this will be activated to customers and will we receive any notification or communication regarding this?. Im unable to get clarity which they mentioned on the " At Certain Point". if you have any information Please share the same.

4) The following SAP page they mentioned to we can find the "Define task for line item validation" in configuration activity, But we are unable to find this in our system. I believe this may be related to the Pre-requisite above page and 'Activate feature' steps which I mentioned above.

URL:https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/ee9ee0ca4c3942068ea584d2f929b5b1/998dafecbd6a41ef8a75c2b03a09eab7.html?parentHref=/whats-new/4328a3353fb14ef6ba3345697ac9ecc3?locale=en-US&parentName=Preliminary+What%27s+New+-+SAP+S/4HANA+Cloud+Public+Edition+2502

SAPURL: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b249d650b15e4b3d9fc2077ee921abd0/826e3120d0cd43d4a5cf75a93e07037d.html

 

5) SAP saying that it will deprecated Data Validation App in future release in the below page as part of 2502 upgrade.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/ee9ee0ca4c3942068ea584d2f929b5b1/c0abeaddeb504c1c9365917e0c4e726c.html

Related to this, I have a question: will the deprecation of this app impact other apps like F8365, F2635, and F8364, which are indirectly linked to Data Monitor and Consolidation Monitor? I believe these apps serve as alternatives and can be navigated to individually. Once we run Data Monitor and Consolidation Monitor, the task log refers to the same pages of the above apps that are linked. I'm checking for any potential impact on this point?

6) With the introduction of new balance validation apps as part of the 2502 upgrade, will there be any additional rules delivered as part of the Best Practices content? Will the existing standard validation rules undergo any changes? I read on the SAP page that existing rules will be migrated. Will this happen gradually based on the note mentioned on the 'Activate Feature' page, or will they be automatically migrated once we toggle the 'Balance Validation Process' or enable it?

Thank you for your time

Srinivasa.S

entry.title: Search in Community does not consider the content in Comments
entry.content:
Hello Community Admin Team,

Request your help with one thing.
I noticed that the 'Search' in Community does not consider the content in Comments posted for a Blog Post.

I have been updating the Blog Posts using Comments for the latest info and additional updates. Also, readers have been contributing with valuable info which could help many.

Can we do something to have 'Search' also to consider the content in Comments?

Thanks,
Abhijit

SAP Community

entry.title: Crystal Reports - SAP Business One - GS1 Datamatrix Code
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

i like to create a Datamatrix Code with GS1 Standard. As far as I know Crystal report does not support Datamatrix Codes, but it can be achived with additional tools.

Who has live customers creating Datamatrix Codes (maybe even with GS1 Standard) and which tools are the using ?

 

Kind regards
Tobias

entry.title: Re: GR Print Preview in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi kaya-ya

Probably not directly from that app.

However, you will get a pop-up or result dialog after you do the post.

That dialog will list the Material Document created by the Post.

It is also a hyperlink - so if you click that link, you will be directed to the object page for the Material Document.

Then go to the item details

From there you can review the generated PDF.

This is of course you choose some output in the print input field during the post.

 

I hope this helps

Thank you

Jerry
